notifications.subtitle: Get real-time alerts for payouts, account activity, and important updates.
notifications.note: You can manage notification preferences at any time in your device settings.

att.subtitle: We use analytics to improve your experience. Your financial data is never shared with third parties.
att.bullet3: Helps us build a better product for you
att.note: Tracking is used only for app improvement. You can change this in your device Settings > Privacy.

slide1.subtitle: Enterprise-grade payment infrastructure that scales with your business

slide2.subtitle: One integration. Every payment method. Any market, anywhere in the world.

slide3.subtitle: Fast, reliable payouts to merchants and sellers in 70+ countries.

payouts.ibanHelper: Enter the destination bank account IBAN
payouts.confirmDescription: Please review the details before sending.
payouts.successDescription: {amount} is on its way to the destination account.
